creator: linpct@gmail.com
text:
Hello, Steve,

    Please ignore this pr, I've sent a new one (0.11.4) at
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=180671
    Thanks.


2013/6/28 Daniel Lin <linpct@gmail.com>

> Thanks, I'll check the error again.
>
>
> 2013/6/26 Steve Wills <swills@freebsd.org>
>
>> Fails to compile for me, see
>>
>>
>> http://meatwad.mouf.net/tb/errors/9.1-RELEASE-amd64-FreeBSD/node-devel-0.11.2.log
>>
>> ../deps/v8/include/v8.h: In function 'v8::Handle<v8::Value>
>> node::SetFastBufferConstructor(const v8::Arguments&)':
>> ../deps/v8/include/v8.h:5884: sorry, unimplemented: inlining failed in
>> call to 'v8::Handle<v8::Primitive> v8::Undefined(v8::Isolate*)': function
>> not inlinable
>> ../src/node_buffer.cc:1022: sorry, unimplemented: called from here
>>
>> Steve
>>
>>
>>
